log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:15+3=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:12+-2=10 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:6+-2=4 vs DC 16] FAIL!
REASONING: Throwing rock at Owlin — Bardic Musician (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:5+9=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 29 damage. Owlin — Bardic Musician HP: 38/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Owlin — Bardic Musician.
→ Javelin: [d20:11+6=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 13 damage. Owlin — Bardic Musician HP: 25/67
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Owlin — Bardic Musician.
→ Javelin: [d20:8+6=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 damage. Owlin — Bardic Musician HP: 14/67
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (14/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Owlin — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
REASONING: Throwing rock at Owlin — Bardic Musician (distant).
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Owlin — Bardic Musician.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Owlin — Bardic Musician.
--- Owlin — Bardic Musician --- HP: 14/67 | AC: 14 | Cond: [invisible] | Conc: Greater Invisibility
REASONING: Concentrating on Greater Invisibility. Vicious Mockery on Frost Giant (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:2+3=5 vs DC 16] FAIL! 4 psychic damage. HP: 134/138
REASONING: Throwing rock at Owlin — Bardic Musician (distant).
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Owlin — Bardic Musician.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Owlin — Bardic Musician.
→ Javelin: [d20:13+6=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 9 damage. Owlin — Bardic Musician HP: 5/67
--- Owlin — Bardic Musician --- HP: 5/67 | AC: 14 | Cond: [invisible] | Conc: Greater Invisibility
REASONING: Concentrating on Greater Invisibility. Vicious Mockery on Ogre (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Ogre.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:7+-2=5 vs DC 16] FAIL! 4 psychic damage. HP: 55/59

→ Javelin: [d20:15+6=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 8 damage. Owlin — Bardic Musician HP: -3/67

→ Rock: [d20:18+9=27 vs AC 14] HIT! 27 damage. Owlin — Bardic Musician HP: 40/67

ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
